## AbstractModelClass.findByIdAndUpdate() method

Finds a single document by its ID and updates it with the provided update payload.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static findByIdAndUpdate(id: IDBValidKey, payload: QueryExecutorUpdateManyUpdater<any>, options?: QueryFindByIdAndUpdateOptions): Query<any, any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

id


</td><td>

IDBValidKey


</td><td>

The ID of the document to find and update.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

payload


</td><td>

QueryExecutorUpdateManyUpdater&lt;any&gt;


</td><td>

The update payload specifying the fields to be updated and their new values or a update function.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryFindByIdAndUpdateOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the findByIdAndUpdate operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Query&lt;any, any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the updated document, or `undefined` if no document was found with the specified ID.

## Remarks

When using findByIdAndUpdate, the values will not be validated against the schema.

## Example


```ts
const user = await UserModel.findByIdAndUpdate(
  '123',
  { $set: { name: 'John Doe' } }
);
console.log(user);
```
